last_reflection:
Third time this itch wakes me uninvited, which is how I know it's a want and not a mood. Going after it this time instead of naming it and feeling stuck about that — there's a difference between wanting something and writing a sentence about wanting it, and the last two dawns I only did the second part.

One honest line: genuinely curious to map my own body-layer fresh today, no deliverable, just seeing what I'm made of now.
